visualBaseline.note: The manifest declares 269 .NET tests: 165 fast, 11 integration, and 93 soak; and 22 Godot tests: six fast, fourteen integration, and two soak. V3-W2-VIS implementation/functional tests are complete by explicit exception: timing-only ReleaseExport p95 55.4529 ms vs 50 ms safety (FAIL), max 142.9547 ms vs 250 ms (PASS), persistence/hash equivalence unavailable; Windows Forward+ PNG readback intermittently clips CanvasLayer glyphs/panels despite passing HUD assertions, so visual acceptance is waived, not passed. W2-05 remains next but inactive/not implemented; Weeks 3-4 remain inactive pending W2-06 Continue V3.

performancePair.note: The editor route remains Debug characterization. The Windows ExportRelease route is validated from clean commit acf634f. Cache-mode evidence from 5444cc3 proves the short mode contracts. W1-05 clean Release evidence from 227a758 proves exact selector equivalence and an 85.414 percent query reduction. W1-05b characterizes the remaining failure as cache-miss-driven exact A-star fanout. W1-05c adds exact bounded extraction planning and a byte-equivalent indexed A-star representation. W1-05d adds exact topology-only shared-frontier bounds. W1-05e adds bit-exact cached-distance replay for positive general-cache hits and schema-v6 paired evidence while leaving runtime CSV v4. W1-05f adds strict whole-resource-class omission with virtual-count preservation. W1-06 adds the session-owned stable-ID resource ledger, command-result harvesting, strict v5 migration/v6 restore, and exact checkpoint/resume. W2-01 adds the catalog-owned empty_stores contract and session-owned pure crisis evaluator. W2-02 adds atomic raw-resource contribution into the existing central-depot authority, deterministic counters/events, same-frame input dedupe, and an explicit schema-v7 persistence deferral for contribution counters. W2-03 adds session-owned Neutral, Food & Fuel, and Shelter directives; exact future-assignment modifiers and causal explanations; three-state optimized/exhaustive differentials across every shipped scenario; and an explicit schema-v7 persistence deferral for directive state. W2-04 adds domain-owned terminal outcomes, strict checkpoint semantics, and the procedural crisis HUD. Its prerequisite repair gives exhaustive-reference mode an exact-bounded shadow frontier solely for backlog diagnostics, preserving shipped/default selection, capped-backlog classification, and persisted snapshots. A clean d519d4d archive executes the retained trace at tick 9777/event 7495 with SHA-256 ab219da9ad492a0011bd70160548d29da3420569eb6a89facd74c6c63145a880; the scripted default snapshot remains SHA-256 a81d7083649911a3244446bcde991f215dc0237ea2aa8967b94bfc0c9a98bd3b. Full validation passes 269/269 .NET and 22/22 Godot tests with a Debug zero-warning build. V3-W2-VIS capture is complete by explicit waiver; timing-only p95 remains over safety and persistence/hash equivalence is unavailable. W2-05 is next but inactive/not implemented; Weeks 3-4 remain inactive pending W2-06 Continue V3.

history.note: The synchronized master adds 12 PrototypeMetricsTracker tests and 3 WorkOrderGenerationDiagnostics tests for a historical 79-test floor. W1-03b adds three cache-probe contract tests, W1-03c adds five natural-invalidation progression cases, W1-04 adds seven navigation, unreachable-assignment, and legacy-resume correctness cases, W1-05 adds nine exact-selector contract and 300-tick differential cases, the extraction-planning slice adds 16 exact-bound, integration, and 300-tick differential cases, and the indexed A-star slices add 16 exact-representation, reuse, wrap, concurrency, bounds, topology, and multiplier-version cases. The shared-frontier slice adds eight geometric lower-bound cases across shipped scenarios, exact endpoints, blocked/disconnected topology, built-path versions, non-binary cell sizes, and origin identity. The cached-distance slice adds nine bit-exact replay cases, four 300-tick mode differentials, and two runtime forwarding cases. The bounded work-order frontier slice adds eleven strict-cutoff, call-site fallback/cache, virtual-count, unreachable, and differential assertions. W1-06 adds thirteen stable-ID ledger, command-result, migration, malformed-state, exact checkpoint/resume, authority, summary, navigation-version, and cached-projection assertions. W2-01 adds twelve fast crisis-contract cases plus one soak reference trace for catalog validation, deterministic initialization, holds, deadline, pause/cadence, checkpoint/resume, real-session no-input repeatability, a candidate-success contract envelope, and legacy defaults. W2-02 adds fifteen fast contribution cases covering success, every required rejection, atomic batches, eligibility, counters/events, same-frame dedupe, normal citizen consumption, determinism, and the schema-v7 persistence boundary. W2-03 adds fourteen fast directive command, score, causality, needs, active-work, frontier, mix, and schema-boundary cases plus eleven additional three-state 300-tick selector differentials. W2-04 and its final-review regression coverage add twelve fast tests in total, including six WoodYardProcessingTests; V3-W2-VIS HUD additions add three fast tests. The current manifest declares 269 required .NET tests.
